EmailTemplate.description: Template for push alert of Pro Space contact validation at 28 day after creation
EmailTemplate.name: Lead - Pro Space ContactValidation D+28
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Contact is waiting for a validation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear user,
Your contact {!Contact.LastName} {!Contact.FirstName} is waiting for validation.
You still have 2 days for validating this contact.
Regards,
System Administrator
